business_hours.notes: Friday closes 30 minutes early. No holiday exceptions — managed manually.

emergency_definitions.description: Complete HVAC failure in a critical environment — server room, hospital, restaurant walk-in
emergency_definitions.fallback_on_timeout: I wasn't able to reach our dispatch team. Your information has been recorded and an on-call technician will contact you within 30 minutes.

emergency_definitions.description: Complete AC or heating failure during extreme weather conditions (heat wave or freeze)
emergency_definitions.fallback_on_timeout: I wasn't able to reach our dispatch team. Your information has been recorded and someone will contact you shortly.

integration_constraints.rule_description: Automatically create service requests for maintenance and inspection calls. Do not auto-create emergency repair jobs — those must be manually entered by the dispatcher.

special_rules: Never route billing or payment questions to the on-call technician — even after hours.
If caller mentions a life-threatening situation (fire, gas smell), instruct them to call 911 immediately.
Do not promise specific technician arrival times unless dispatch confirms.

overrides_from_demo.reason: Friday is consistent — no change needed
